name: U City Public Company Limited
summary: U City Public Company Limited operates as a diversified real estate investment and development company in Thailand and internationally. The company operates through Hotel Business, Rental Business, and Management Business segments. It provides securities investment, property ownership and management, consulting, office and commercial rental, and land and structure leasing services; and operates and manages hotels, golf courses, and sports clubs. The company was formerly known as Natural Park Public Company Limited and changed its name to U City Public Company Limited in April 2015. U City Public Company Limited was incorporated in 1988 and is headquartered in Bangkok, Thailand.
